rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Dual auth systems coexist: SessionStore/UserStore (SHA-256, session) and AuthService/JwtService (PBKDF2, JWT) — consolidate before adding new features.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"decision","text":"JWT auth already fully implemented (HMAC-SHA256, rotation, blacklist, refresh) — the task is integration, not implementation.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"HIGH complexity tasks (30+ files) trigger a risk gate that pauses the pipeline at plan stage — complexity scoring gates deployment.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"New JWT fields (jwt_secret, exp, iat) require database migrations — schema changes must be applied before middleware swaps.","scope":"migrations"},{"kind":"decision","text":"RBAC roles (admin/editor/viewer) must be layered onto the JWT payload — define role claims before updating middleware.","scope":"auth/RBAC"}]}
